{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"flowchart LR Raw[Raw Filter Object
{Entity, Filter: {...}}] Lint[lintFilterObject] Parse[parseFilterObject] Build[buildFilterExpression
per filter entry] Group[Group by Entity into
FilterExpressionSet] Solve[solveGraphConnections
for each non-pivotal entity] Compile[compileFilter
assembles Requests array] Strings[convertFilterObjectToFilterString
emit meadow filter strings] Plan[CompiledGraphRequest] Raw --> Lint Lint --> Parse Parse --> Build Build --> Group Group --> Solve Solve --> Compile Compile --> Strings Strings --> Plan ","style":"notebook"}
